CustomField.description: Master switch controlling whether transport trips must be generated for this opportunity. When unchecked, the engine skips all trip creation and cost calculation regardless of line item dates.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box if physical transport (delivery and/or pickup) is required for this opportunity. When unchecked, no trips or transport costs will be generated, even if line items have delivery or pickup dates.
CustomField.label: Is Transport Required
